input.label: BIG-IP Hostname:
input.populatingSearch: sourcetype = psm_log protocol=SMTP | stats max(violations) by unit_hostname

chart.title: Events Time Distribution by Virtual Server
Top Attacked Virtual Servers (alarmed)
chart.searchTemplate: sourcetype="psm_log" protocol=SMTP unit_hostname = $unit_hostname$ request_status=alerted| top vs_name limit=20

chart.title: Top Attacked Virtual Servers (blocked)
chart.searchTemplate: sourcetype="psm_log" protocol=SMTP unit_hostname = $unit_hostname$ request_status=blocked| top vs_name limit=20
